$comment: FC4 c2: the fold-resistant indirect-call witness — apply is self-recursive (SCC refuses inlining, unit-pinned) and the fn-ptr arrives as a call-boundary arg, so the indirect call survives the declared full-release-like 7-pass arm and can never devirtualize to a direct call; the (*f) form runtime-witnesses the deref-decay fold. An Inlining-bearing arm is deliberately ABSENT: the shipped release composition fails loud on recursion today (pre-existing engine bug — D-OPT-RELEASE-PIPELINE-CONTROL-FLOW-COMPOSITION, registry); add the ["Inlining"] arm when that anchor closes.
